Şimdi, başlangıcında hukuksal icap olmayan işlerde devamında da hukuksal icaplar aranmaz. Burada siyasi icaplar var, yolu temizleme ihtiyacı var; göreceğiz.
Şimdi, hukukçu Sayın Başkan da ifade etti, "Biz hukukçuyuz." dedi, diğer konuşmacılar da ifade etti, "Kıymetli hukukçular bu Komisyonda var." dedi; ben de katılıyorum, evet. Bir savcı çıkacak, siyasi kimlikle oturduğu Adalet Bakanı Yardımcılığından gelecek, başsavcı yapılacak, sonra ne hukuku ne yargıyı ne adaleti bırakacak, buna da yirmi üç yıllık iktidar sessiz kalacak. Bugün yaşananların Ergenekon davalarından farkı yok; bu savcının yaptığı işlerin hukuksal izahı da yok, hukukta yeri de yok. Bir savcı, başsavcı, Türkiye başsavcısı gibi davranıyor, her konuda kendini yetkili görüyor. "Yetki" dendiği zaman hukukçular anlar yetkinin ne anlama geldiğini.
Şimdi, Ümit Özdağ'ı Antalya'da yaptığı bir konuşmadan sonra Ankara'da gözaltına alıyorlar o iddiayla, sonra yolda iddia değişiyor, Cumhurbaşkanına hakarete dönüşüyor, bakıyorlar, oradan da bir şey çıkmayacak, sonunda Kayseri'de yaptığı bir konuşmada halkı tahrik ve düşmanlığa sevk etmek suçlamasıyla tutuklanıyor. Yahu, Kayseri savcısı yok mu, Antalya savcısı yok mu, Ankara savcısı yok mu? İstanbul'daki başsavcı yani bu iş... Hukuksal anlamda arkadaşlar -hepimiz "hukukçu" diyoruz- bu CMK'nin hangi yetki kuralına uygun bir tutum, işlem? Şimdi "Bu, hukuksal." mı diyeceğiz?
Şimdi, Kent Uzlaşısı diye bir şey var, bir iddia var. Ya, buradaki iddia şu, iddianın özü şu: Sen İstanbul'da AK PARTİ'yi yenecek yöntemi nasıl buldun, niye buldun? Suçlamanın özü bu, sonra kılıf uyduruyorlar. İBB soruşturmasında yapılan yanlışlıkları zaten arkadaşlar ifade etti; hükmü baştan verilmiş, şimdi kılıf aranıyor ama bulunamıyor. Eğer Ergenekon döneminde -dikkatinizi çekiyorum- idam cezası olsa idi, sonradan suçsuz olduğu ortaya çıkan pek çok komutan artık yaşamıyordu, asılarak idam edilecekti, aralarında 26'ncı Genelkurmay Başkanı da olacaktı. Sonra, bu davaların savcısı olanlar "Aldatıldık." dediler, şimdi yine televizyonlarda, orada burada, salonlarda türlü türlü iddiaları dile getiriyorlar; göreceğiz.
Yürütme yargıyı tahakküm altına almış, savcı da durumdan vazife çıkarıyor. Savcı diploma iptalini isteyebilir mi arkadaşlar, soruşturma aşamasında? "Diplomayı iptal et." diye yazı yazıyor, üniversiteye yazı gönderiyor. Savcı "Ekrem İmamoğlu'nun resimlerini asmayın, indirin." diyebilir mi? Masumiyet karinesine ne oldu, lekelenmeme hakkına ne oldu? Sayıştayın yerine geçmiş, dosya dosya inceleme yapıyor; suç ihbarı, suç şüphesi yok, suç icat etme isteği var, öyle talimat almış, "Bir suç bul, İmamoğlu'nu önümden çek." demişler, kim dediyse.
Şimdi deniyor ki: "Anayasa yapalım, demokratik anayasa olsun." Sivil olacakmış; komik ama espri değil trajikomik. Son seçimin 1'inci partisi kim? Cumhuriyet Halk Partisi. O, bu Anayasa sürecinin neresinde? Yok. Partisinin Cumhurbaşkanı adayına yönelik talimatlı, hukuksuz, yargı aracı kılınarak yapılan siyasi darbeyi soruşturmakla meşgul; partisinin yüz akı, demokratik delege tercihiyle Genel Başkanını değiştirebildiği kurultayına yönelik iptal davasıyla, soruşturma dosyalarıyla meşgul. AK PARTİ değil miydi "İktidar partisi olarak kapatma davasına muhatap olduk." diyerek yakınan? Şimdi, bizim, son seçimin 1'inci partisi Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinin durumu ne? AK PARTİ'nin başına öyle bir şey geldiğinde biz iktidar değildik ama şimdi AK PARTİ iktidar, dolayısıyla bu yapılanların sorumluluğu da
Ak PARTİ'de. "Konuşmayın." diyerek de bunlardan, bu sorumluluklardan kimse kurtulamaz. Anayasa yapılacakmış; ülke batmış, emekli, işçi, memur, emekçi, esnaf, çiftçi, sanayici batmış, ekonomik anlamda herkes tükenmiş ama Sayın Erdoğan'ın dile getirdiği bir anayasa ihtiyacı var.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Sayın Ünver, sözünüzü kesmek istemiyorum ama toparlayalım.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Toparlıyorum Sayın Başkan, toparlıyorum. Az kaldı, şurada, az kaldı, toparlıyorum.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Buyurun.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Anayasa yapma isteği karşısında soru şu: Mevcut Anayasa’nın engel olduğu şey ne? Onu bilsek belki bu konuda da bir fikir dile getirebiliriz. Zaten ülke ne zaman ekonomik veya siyasi çalkantıya düşsün, Sayın Erdoğan'ın aklına anayasa yapmak geliyor. "Uyulmayan Anayasa'yı yapmaya da gerek var mı?" diye bir soru herkesin aklında. Nasıl olsa ülkeyi yöneten kafasına göre yönetmiyor mu? "Anayasa'da şu yasaklanmış, iktidar yapmaz." diyeceğimiz bir şey yok.
Bakın, daha geçen hafta, Anayasa-Adalet Karma Komisyonunda HSK üyeliğine aday seçimi yaptık. Bırakın Sayın Cumhurbaşkanını, Komisyon çoğunluğunu, hukukçu olan Komisyon milletvekillerini Anayasa bağladı mı? Anayasa'da olmayan bir 3'üncü tur oylama icat edildi ve HSK üyelikleri o şekilde önerildi; şimdi, hepimiz oradaydık. Dolayısıyla iktidar samimiyse önce bu konularda samimiyetini göstermeli, zira bu yönde geçmiş sicili çok bozuk.
Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkan.
records.englishTranslation:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Mr. President, first of all, I respectfully salute our Commission and esteemed bureaucrats.
I would like to say the following in general about this bill - of course it has been said many times - and I would like to repeat it: The amount of penalties imposed is really very high, that is, this will be contrary to the criterion of proportionality of the penalty, the criterion of proportionality, and the principle of proportionality to the act; At the same time, I think it's unfair.
Our Deputy Süleyman Bülbül also stated in his speech that in our country - I do not have any data at this point, but the Ministry of Internal Affairs definitely has it - traffic
I remember information that the majority of the vehicles are over five years old. In other words, due to the economic conditions of our country, vehicles older than five years are heavily trafficked. Now, the value and price of these vehicles are naturally low, so I have a guess that many vehicles, perhaps more than half, perhaps 70-80 percent, are under 1 million vehicles. If our Ministry of Internal Affairs has more precise information on this subject, we would be pleased if it could share it. Now, at this point, I think imposing penalties for vehicles worth 500 thousand, 600 thousand, 400 thousand, 800 thousand and their drivers at rates that exceed half the price of vehicles such as 141 thousand, 150 thousand, 370 thousand, etc., is against the principle of proportionality of penalties. I would like to express that it would be useful to review these penalty amounts in this regard. In other words, if we apply these penalties, when we also take into account the income level of the citizen, a citizen receiving a pension of 14,500 lira, a worker receiving a minimum wage of 22 thousand lira, a civil servant receiving a salary of 50 thousand lira, 55 thousand lira, 60 thousand lira, being subjected to such a penalty or similar penalties will really cause the destruction of families. Of course, it is our right to make political criticism here as well as this aspect of this technical work. With the economic crisis and depression it created, AKP put an end to people's dreams of owning a house and a car. The increasing severity of the crisis of the last two years no longer makes people dream of houses and cars. For this reason, now, everyone will sell their vehicles and get rid of these exorbitant fines; Now we will see together how we will provide transportation.
Now, in addition to this, there is an article in this law that caught my attention - of course, we evaluate the articles separately - the additional 20th article of the draft text: "It is forbidden to publicly disseminate and praise images that encourage traffic rule violations by sharing through the press, publications, internet, social and digital media or other electronic devices an action that is prohibited by this Law by imposing administrative sanctions. Those who do not comply with the provisions of this article will be given an administrative fine of 25,000 Turkish liras."
Now, since the negotiations of this law began - or the ministry representatives of the law and the first signatories of the law - what have we been saying: We have introduced this regulation to prevent traffic accidents and loss of life. We would be grateful if you could share with us the loss of life, accident or statistical information on this point that has been caused by this regulation, this additional article; as the reason for shipping this item.
CHAIRMAN CÜNEYT Yüksel - Which article, Mr. Ünver?

İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Additional article 20, Mr. President.
NURETTİN ALAN (Istanbul) - Sharing and praising in places such as social media.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yes, it is about praising.
Now, of course, we have to take the statements as basis, but it is also our duty to catch some - let's say - treachery committed while drafting the law. As a member of parliament, I would like to express this here. Let me at least express my doubts about the implementation of this law on my own behalf.
In the additional article 10 of the proposal, there is a regulation regarding these convoys, driving in groups, etc. Now, based on this additional article 20, they made the convoy; who did it; For example, farmers in Yozgat did it.
MAHMUT TANAL (Şanlıurfa) - It is performed at weddings.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - He performed at weddings
But I don't think they will take these weddings into consideration.
Farmers in Yozgat did it and set out with their tractors; "Stop!" You said, you wrote fines of 90 thousand liras each, and then it appeared on the internet, on social media, on television, some politicians, for example CHP politicians, praised it, some journalists praised it, what will happen? With the additional article 20, 25 thousand more; Is it, isn't it? If not, say "not." ("That's right, that's right!" sounds) Is that right? I think so.
Now, here we are, we've been talking since the morning; We are talking about whether it was this or that, where did justice go, where did the law come to, how does the judiciary work? Now, if we make laws like this, the judiciary will work like this. Here we see that AKP has no respect for freedoms, law and democracy, even when making laws. If our signatory MP friends suggested this, this is my accusation against them; If Ministry representatives suggested it, my blame is on the Ministry. Respect democracy, do not be disturbed by people exercising their right to protest in accordance with the Constitution. At this point, this regulation must be removed from this law; Let me express this.
Now, I have the "Judicial Reform Strategy Document" of the Ministry of Justice, covering the years 2025-2029. Here, the Ministry of Justice says: A series of legislative regulations revealing that detention is an exceptional protection measure are among the most important of them. Arrest is an exception. Really?
İNAN AKGÜN ALP (Kars) - Normally it is.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - "An important aim of the reform process will be to further improve the investment environment. In this context, it is aimed to strengthen legal security and predictability." In the Judicial Strategy Document, it is stated as "here is what we have done so far", article 25. There is legal security in Türkiye, the aim is to strengthen predictability and increase investments. Really? Why did you burn 55 billion dollars on March 19?
"A separate maximum detention period was determined for the investigation phase, and if these periods were exceeded, the detention was terminated in accordance with the law." Kavala; It was decided to release him, he was arrested for another crime. Is there any application of this period and the principle written here? Ahmet Özer; He was arrested on terrorism charges, then arrested again on a bench charge, a corruption-related allegation. It's easy to write but to implement.
"In order for the reason for arrest to be considered, the existence of strong grounds of suspicion based on concrete evidence is required.

"Evidence showing that judicial control will be insufficient is required to be shown in the decision, justified by concrete facts." In other words, it says that the conditions of arrest must necessarily be stated in the decision.
Let me also say this: In order for judicial control to be granted, the conditions of arrest must be met. In today's practice, we say "Judicial control was given." We rejoice in some works. Judicial practice has reached such a point that in the crime of insult, a crime that has no merit, "Judicial control was given." The AKP judiciary has brought Türkiye and us to the point of rejoicing. He states that where the conditions of arrest should be concrete, the conditions of judicial control should also be concrete. This is the Judicial Reform Strategy Document of the Justice and Development Party and the Ministry of Justice, describing what they have done so far.
Again, so many good things have been done that what is written in these documents; While there were 85 people in prison per 100 thousand people in 2002, today the number of people in prison per 100 thousand people has increased to 443, that is, an increase of 420 percent. According to this table, Türkiye has become the most important criminal country in Europe. What do we say? You have a slogan, it's famous, I won't tell you, it's already in your mind.
Now, for months we have been saying "We will evacuate the prisons, the occupancy rate in prisons has increased greatly." says the Ministry of Justice and AK Party representatives, but at the point we have reached today, they cannot do that either. Unfortunately, we see that the expected Execution Law regulation does not seem to be possible.
Now, he has broken away from universal law, has given up on the claim of democracy, for a while he reduced democracy to just getting more or less votes in elections, and now, when he became the second party in the last local election, he has given up on that as well. "Democracy is not a goal for us, but a means. Democracy is a tram for us, we get off when we reach the stop we want." We are struggling to regain the freedoms suspended by the judiciary under the domination of a mentality that says: We are trying to do politics against the judicial mechanism, which has become politicized, turned into an apparatus of the government, and is a tool for the political operations to be carried out, to produce and propose solutions to the problems of the country from our own perspective, but unfortunately our political interlocutors have not had their share of democracy - I am sorry to say - unfortunately, they have not been able to internalize democracy and have an understanding that does not respect the ballot box. "Whatever the people say goes." Those who say, intend to remove the ballot box when they lose the election, and even if they cannot, they try to determine their own opponent with the power they have to govern and dominate the judiciary, and they believe that they have the right to do so. What kind of democracy is this, what class of democracy? Do Putin's democracy, Assad's democracy, Middle East, Latin America and Africa democracy suit Türkiye? Do you see this as a good thing for yourself? If those who governed the country before you had seen this as a good thing for Türkiye and themselves, AK PARTY would not have come to power. AK PARTY came to power thanks to free elections. Now it is imitating the destruction of free elections, cutting off the branch it is sitting on, and eliminating its own legitimacy and causing controversy. Who is he doing it against? He is doing this against the party that contributed to the lifting of the political ban of Mr. Erdoğan, who was banned from doing politics at the time.

There may be those who don't know, there may be those who have forgotten, but we need to remember those days. Mr. Erdogan founded the AK PARTY after he was banned from politics and moved away from the Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality. He first became a parliamentary candidate from Istanbul in the 2002 elections; The Electoral Board did not approve his candidacy due to his political ban and he was removed from the list. In 2002, Kemal Unakıtan became a candidate and elections were held. AK PARTY became the first party and came to power. The other party that entered the parliament was the Republican People's Party. Our Chairman of that day, Mr. Baykal, said, "If a politician who entered the election as the Chairman and whose name is written on the ballot paper is the leader of his party, he should also be a member of parliament and even the Prime Minister." He made a statement and paved the way for the removal of the prohibition provision in the Constitution. Then, in Siirt, Fadıl Akgündüz's seat as a member of parliament was reduced because he was not eligible to be elected, the AK PARTY had its own MP resign, and the Republican People's Party also had a member of parliament in Siirt.
İNAN AKGÜN ALP (Kars) - Ekrem Bilek.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yes, Ekrem Bilek.
Ekrem Bilek was resigned by the Republican People's Party and the number of deputies in Siirt was vacated, completely vacated, and the Siirt elections were repeated in accordance with the Constitution, Mr. Erdoğan was elected as a deputy from Siirt, entered the Parliament and became the Prime Minister.
At the point we have reached today, the Republican People's Party is pursuing a policy in its own way, with its own political understanding, and making some suggestions according to its political program regarding the future of the country, but our counterpart, the ruling party, says, "If I am in power, everything is free, and if I am not in power, everything is free."
Let it all end." He walks with his understanding. In this sense, the AKP government is a government that canceled the election it lost. The AKP government is a government that held and won the referendum with unsealed votes, despite the clear provision of law. Then the YSK said: "There is no need for a stamp on the ballot envelopes." Then the referendum was over, the election law was changed, and the seal requirement was abolished. If that was the case, why did the law change? The AKP government is a government that uses the state and state resources ruthlessly and to the fullest extent in election propaganda. TRT is a broadcasting organization that survives with all of our taxes. During the elections, after the elections, now; Those who manage TRT and those who gave this instruction to TRT do not give twenty seconds, five seconds or three seconds to any opposition party, the main opposition party. Maybe these will win the election, maybe they will protect the seats, but we are people of faith, they are all responsible. Those who turn a blind eye to these things, those who ignore them, those who remain silent, and those who support them will all suffer this plague. Unfortunately, the AKP government is a government that does not respect rights, law and justice with what it does.
Now, we are talking about the judiciary, we are talking about current judicial practices, we are in the Justice Commission; Well, while there are a lot of expectations, we are discussing the Highway Traffic Law. Of course, it is an important law, but the place to be discussed is the Internal Affairs Commission. If we are discussing this in the Justice Commission, we will also use our right to speak about justice.
Now there are two concepts: "FETO judiciary" and "AKP judiciary". What is the difference where we are today?

Make allegations and slander, discredit, invent false evidence, find secret witnesses, make them lie, break the law, arrest, prepare a slander instead of an indictment, file a lawsuit; Afterwards, it doesn't matter whether he is punished or not, as long as he is discredited. FETO is gone, its victims are gone, new victims have arrived, but there is only one actor that has not changed: AK PARTY. Then, the question we are looking for an answer to is: Did you learn these methods from FETO, or were these methods already the AKP's method and did it use FETO as a subcontractor? It seems that the real relationship between them is the perpetrator-instigator relationship. So, AKP was not deceived. "We were deceived." He deceived everyone by saying. The person who is deemed objectionable is first condemned by the ruling mind - whoever that mind is -, it is decided to purify him politically, and then the button is pressed. Then, with all kinds of unlawfulness.
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - President, what does what you are talking about have anything to do with our topic, employees, and highways?
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Well, we are in the Justice Commission, so shouldn't we talk about these?
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - Didn't your Chairman make a press statement in front of Zaman newspaper?
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Well, if we count yours, there is no end. If we count yours, there is no end.
CHAIRMAN CÜNEYT Yüksel - Dear Ünver, let me summarize.
SÜLEYMAN BÜLBÜL (Aydın) - Will he ask you what he will talk about?
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - You are making accusations.
CHAIRMAN CÜNEYT Yüksel - Mr. Tuğrul.
SÜLEYMAN BÜLBÜL (Aydın) - Give it to me, then we can talk about whatever you want.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Considering your relations with FETO, there will be no end to this matter, Mr. Deputy.
MAYOR CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Mr. Ünver, let's wrap things up please.
SÜLEYMAN BÜLBÜL (Aydın) - The MP who will speak freely is here.
CHAIRMAN CÜNEYT Yüksel - Mr. Fahrettin.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Well, you say, "These did not happen."
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - What does what you are talking about have anything to do with the Highway Traffic Law?
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Here is what the Highway Traffic Law has to do with the Justice Commission, it should be discussed in the Internal Affairs Commission.
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - You have been talking for four hours.
İNAN AKGÜN ALP (Kars) - In your opinion, shouldn't justice be discussed in the Justice Commission?
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Do not speak in the Justice Commission, do not speak in the Parliament, do not speak on television, do not go to the square, do not speak on the street; Where will these people talk? Where will these people talk?
ÖMER ÖZMEN (Aydın) - You talk everywhere, everywhere.
MAYOR CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Mr. Ünver, let's wrap things up please.
Here you go.
SÜLEYMAN BÜLBÜL (Aydın) - Just wait, we will talk until the morning, just wait.
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - Well, we will talk until the morning, we are not afraid of that, Deputy Süleyman, we will talk from morning to evening, but those who made a press statement yesterday, shoulder to shoulder with FETO, cannot stand here and connect us with FETO.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - We are not connecting you with FETO, we are explaining your cooperation with FETO.
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - Press release in Zaman newspaper.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Tell me about the others, were you the only one you saw?

Well, you have done so much politics, you are in politics, you are a member of parliament, you are the only one
did you see that?
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - All of them, all of them.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Were you the only one you saw? Did you only see him?
FAHRETTİN TUĞRUL (Uşak) - We know who is related to what, all of them.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Didn't you see those crying?
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - Here you go.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Did you see those crying?
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - Let's complete, let's wrap it up, please.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - I am completing it, Mr. President.
Now, in cases where there is no legal requirement at the beginning, legal requirements are not required in the continuation. There are political necessities here, there is a need to clear the road; we will see.
Now, Mr. President, who is a lawyer, also stated, "We are lawyers." he said, and other speakers also expressed, "There are valuable lawyers in this Commission." he said; I agree too, yes. A prosecutor will appear, he will come from the Deputy Minister of Justice, where he holds a political identity, he will be made chief prosecutor, then he will leave neither the law nor the judiciary nor justice, and the twenty-three-year-old government will remain silent about this. What is happening today is no different from the Ergenekon cases; There is no legal explanation for the actions of this prosecutor, and they have no place in law. He acts like a prosecutor, the chief prosecutor, the chief prosecutor of Türkiye, and sees himself as competent in every matter. When "authority" is mentioned, lawyers understand what authority means.
Now, they take Ümit Özdağ into custody in Ankara after a speech he made in Antalya, with that allegation, then on the way the claim changes, it turns into an insult to the President, they see that nothing will come of it, and in the end, he is arrested on the charge of provoking the public and inciting hostility in a speech he made in Kayseri. Well, isn't there a Kayseri prosecutor, an Antalya prosecutor, an Ankara prosecutor? The chief prosecutor in Istanbul, that is. In legal terms, friends - we all call them "lawyers" - is this an attitude and action in accordance with which jurisdiction rule of the CMK? Now, "This is legal." shall we say?
Now, there is such a thing as Urban Consensus, there is a claim. Well, the claim here is this, the essence of the claim is this: How did you find the method to defeat the AK PARTY in Istanbul, why did you find it? This is the essence of the accusation, then they make up a cover. Friends have already stated the mistakes made in the IMM investigation; The verdict was given from the beginning, now the cover is being searched but cannot be found. If there had been a death penalty during the Ergenekon period - I draw your attention - many commanders who were later found to be innocent would no longer be alive and would have been executed by hanging, among them would have been the 26th Chief of General Staff. Then, the prosecutors of these cases said, "We were deceived." They said, now they are voicing all kinds of allegations on television, here and there, in the living rooms; we will see.
The executive has dominated the judiciary, and the prosecutor is taking responsibility for the situation. Can the prosecutor request the cancellation of the diploma, friends, at the investigation stage? "Cancel the diploma." He writes and sends a letter to the university. Prosecutor: "Do not hang Ekrem İmamoğlu's pictures, take them down." can he say? What happened to the presumption of innocence, what happened to the right not to be tarnished? He replaced the Court of Accounts and is examining file by file; Reporting a crime, there is no suspicion of a crime, there is a desire to invent a crime, he received such instructions: "Find a crime, get İmamoğlu out of my way."

" they said, whoever said it.
Now it is said: "Let's make a constitution, let it be a democratic constitution." He would be a civilian; It's funny but not a joke, it's a tragicomic. Who is the 1st party in the last election? Republican People's Party. Where is he in this Constitutional process? None. He is busy investigating the ordered, illegal, judicially-informed political coup against his party's presidential candidate; He is busy with the investigation files and the annulment case against his party's congress, in which he was able to change its leader with the choice of democratic delegates. Wasn't it the AK Party? "As the ruling party, we were subject to the closure case." complaining by saying? Now, what is the situation of our Republican People's Party, the first party in the last election? We were not in power when such a thing happened to the AK PARTY, but now the AK PARTY is in power, so we are responsible for what was done.
In AK PARTY. "Don't talk." No one can get rid of these, these responsibilities by saying this. The constitution will be made; The country is bankrupt, retirees, workers, civil servants, laborers, tradesmen, farmers, industrialists are bankrupt, everyone is economically exhausted, but there is a need for a constitution as expressed by Mr. Erdogan.
CHAIRMAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Mr. Ünver, I do not want to interrupt you, but let's sum up.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - I'm wrapping it up, Mr. President, I'm wrapping it up. It's almost here, it's almost there, I'm getting it together.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - Here you go.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - The question in the face of the desire to make a Constitution is this: What does the current Constitution prevent? If we knew that, maybe we could express an opinion on this subject. Anyway, whenever the country falls into economic or political turmoil, Mr. Erdoğan thinks of making a constitution. "Is there a need to make a Constitution that is not followed?" There is a question on everyone's mind. After all, doesn't the ruler of the country govern according to his own mind? "This is prohibited in the Constitution, the government cannot do it." We have nothing to say.
Look, just last week, we elected candidates for HSK membership in the Constitution-Justice Joint Commission. Is the Constitution binding on the President, the majority of the Commission, and the Commission deputies who are lawyers? A third round of voting, which was not included in the Constitution, was invented and HSK memberships were proposed that way; Now, we've all been there. Therefore, if the government is sincere, it must first show its sincerity on these issues, because its past record in this regard is very bad.
Thank you, Mr. President.

records.title: Afyonkarahisar Milletvekili İbrahim Yurdunuseven ve Çorum Milletvekili Yusuf Ahlatcı ile 143 Milletvekilinin Karayolları Trafik Kanununda Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3138)

fields.Subject: Afyonkarahisar Milletvekili İbrahim Yurdunuseven ve Çorum Milletvekili Yusuf Ahlatcı ile 143 Milletvekilinin Karayolları Trafik Kanununda Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3138)

records.originalTurkish:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Sayın Başkanım, önergemizden de anlaşılacağı üzere, biz, bu teklif maddesindeki (n) bendinin tekliften çıkarılmasını öneriyoruz. Şöyle ki: Bir defa "konvoy" şeklinde ifade edilen bu düzenleme, yasak, ülkemizin sosyal gerçekliğiyle bağdaşmamaktadır. Mesela düğün konvoyları bizim ülkemizde yaygın bir şekilde yapılan geleneksel bir kutlama biçimidir. Ayrıca, asker uğurlama konvoyları vardır.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Ya, havaya da ateş ediliyor ama o da yaygın biliyorsunuz.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yani mesela ama onlar böyle değil, ortaya çıkardığı zararlar farklı Başkanım, aynı nitelikte değil.
Şimdi, yine aynı şekilde siyasi konvoylar vardır, siyasi partilerin seçim sırasında yaptığı konvoylu çalışmalar vardır. Siyasi parti başkanlarının geldiği törenlerde, bakanların geldiği törenlerde oluşturulmuş konvoylar vardır. Şimdi, tüm bunlar varken böyle bir düzenleme yapmak ortaya çıkan zararla ve ortaya çıkması muhtemel zararla getirilen düzenlemenin orantılılığı ve ölçülülüğü açısından da sıkıntılıdır.
Aynı zamanda Anayasa’nın 2'nci maddesindeki hukuk devleti ilkesine ve 13'üncü maddesinde temel hak ve hürriyetlerin kısıtlanmasıyla ilgili, sınırlanmasıyla ilgili düzenlemeye de aykırıdır.
Sayın teklif sahiplerinden Yurdunuseven "Toplantı ve gösteri izin alınan yerde yapılsın." diye bir yaklaşımda bulundu açıklama yaparken. Tabii, toplantı ve gösterilerin bazılarının da izinsiz yapılabildiğini de bilmek lazım bu anlamda. Dolayısıyla, demokratik olarak yapılabilecek bazı faaliyetlerin veya geleneksel olarak yapılabilecek bazı faaliyetlerin böyle 90 bin lira gibi bir cezayla, her araca ayrıca 90'ar bin lira cezayla cezalandırılacak şekilde bir sınırlamaya tabi tutulması doğru değil. Zaten bu konuda ceza kesmeye engel bir durum yok. Bunun örneklerini daha önce yaşadık. Şimdi, bunu birden bire 900 liradan, bin liradan 90 bin liraya yükseltmek ölçülülük açısından uygun değil, aynı zamanda siyasi bir mahiyet taşıyor.
İlk baştaki geneli üzerine yaptığım konuşmada da ifade ettiğim gibi, Yozgat'ta kaç traktör vardı? Bu
traktörlerin hepsine, 60-70 tane traktöre 90'ar bin lira ceza keseceksiniz. Yani bu, kabul edilebilir bir şey değil. Yozgat'ta olmaz Konya'da olur, Konya'da olmaz bir başka yerde olur. Yani bunları bu şekilde sınırlamak demokratik bir ülkede, hukuk devleti olan bir ülkede doğru değil diyorum. Teklifin çıkarılmasını talep ediyoruz, öneriyoruz.
records.englishTranslation:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Mr. President, as can be seen from our proposal, we propose that clause (n) in this proposal article be removed from the proposal. Namely: This regulation, the ban, once expressed as a "convoy", is incompatible with the social reality of our country. For example, wedding convoys are a traditional form of celebration that is widely held in our country. Additionally, there are military send-off convoys.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - Well, there are also shots fired into the air, but as you know, it is also common.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - For example, but they are not like this, the damages they cause are different, President, they are not of the same nature.
Now, in the same way, there are political convoys, there are convoy activities carried out by political parties during elections. There are convoys formed at the ceremonies where political party leaders come and ministers come. Now, with all these in place, making such a regulation is also problematic in terms of the proportionality and proportionality of the regulation with the harm that occurs and the harm that is likely to occur.
At the same time, it is against the principle of the rule of law in Article 2 of the Constitution and the regulation regarding the restriction and limitation of fundamental rights and freedoms in Article 13.
Yurdunuseven, one of the esteemed bidders, said, "The meeting and demonstration should be held in the place where permission is obtained." He made an approach while making a statement. Of course, it is important to know that some meetings and demonstrations can be held without permission. Therefore, it is not right to limit some activities that can be done democratically or some activities that can be done traditionally, with a fine of 90 thousand liras, and each vehicle will be punished with an additional fine of 90 thousand liras. There is no obstacle to a fine in this regard anyway. We have experienced examples of this before. Now, suddenly increasing it from 900 lira to 1,000 lira to 90 thousand lira is not only appropriate in terms of proportionality, but also has a political nature.
As I stated in my initial general speech, how many tractors were there in Yozgat? this
You will be fined 90 thousand lira for all tractors, 60-70 tractors each. So this is not acceptable. It can't happen in Yozgat, it can happen in Konya, it can't happen in Konya, it can happen somewhere else. So, I'm saying that limiting them in this way is not right in a democratic country, a country with the rule of law. We demand and recommend that the proposal be removed.

records.originalTurkish:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Şimdi, kast öyle ama uygulama öyle olacak mı?
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - İşte, uygulamayı zaten özellikle sorduk.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Ama işte, uygulamayı şekillendirmek lazım.
Bu kullanılan kavramlar, "övmek" ve "özendirme" kavramları yeterince açık ifade edilemedi zaten. Kimin övdüğü, nasıl övdüğü falan...
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Yo, yaymak ve övmek.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - "Özendiren görüntüleri alenen yaymak ve övmek." Kimin övdüğü,
nasıl yaydığı, bunlar biraz karıştı ama...
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - "Övmek"ten kastı da sözlü övmek değil, altına bir şeyler yazmak, yorum yapmak...
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Zaten sosyal medyada ya yazacak veya videosunu söyleyecek.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Emojilerle desteklemek.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yani bu kadar... Şimdi birisi böyle bir paylaşım yaptı, "Ben şu kadar hız yaptım." diye paylaşım yaptı, altına birisi yorum yaptım. O da mı ceza alacak?
İÇİŞLERİ BAKAN YARDIMCISI MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - O yaymıyor, o yayınlayan olması için...
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Öyle dediniz, "Yorum yazdı." dediniz.
İÇİŞLERİ BAKAN YARDIMCISI MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Hayır, hayır; "birlikte" diyoruz Sayın Vekilim. Suçun unsuru için ikisinin aynı anda olması lazım.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Şimdi o zaman şuna bakalım: Az önce...
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Somutlaştıralım: Siz drift yaptınız, siz cezanızı ayrı alacaksınız drift yapmaktan Siber Suçlar yakalayınca. Ben de onu aldım, dedim ki: Milletvekilimiz çok güzel drift yapıyor, çok güzel akrobasi yapıyor. Bakın, işte yayınlıyorum." Hem yaydım, hem övdüm. Bu suç. 25 bin lira bana sadece ama size drift yapmaktan ceza vereceğiz.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Şu suç mu: Yozgat'ta traktörler çıktı kara yoluna, trafiği engelledi diye 10'uncu maddenin (n) bendine göre ceza yazdık, durdular, ettiler diye. Gazeteciler de haber yaptı...
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Ya, çok zorluyorsun...
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Zorlamıyorum, Sayın Vekilim, olacak işler bunlar.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - O övmüyor, o haber yapıyor.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Niyet o değil ama yalnız.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yapılan işler ama.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Yok, niyet o değil ama.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Tamam, söylesinler, "Niyet o değil." diye söylesinler.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - O övmüyor onu, o haber veriyor.
İÇİŞLERİ BAKAN YARDIMCISI MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Sayın Vekilim, yaymak tek başına suç değil, bakın, suçun unsuru birlikte olması.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Tamam, Sayın Bakanım ben anlatayım, şöyle: Şimdi, çıktı, övücü haber yaptı "Bak, ne güzel, demokratik tepkisini gösterdi, şunu yaptı, bunu yaptı." diye haber yaptı.
İÇİŞLERİ BAKAN YARDIMCISI MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Bu Yozgat bizi çok yordu bugün.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Yoracak tabii ki biz de göreceğiz bunları.
Şimdi, "Yozgat değil meramımız, öyle bir ceza kesilmesi..." deyin, rahatlayalım.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - O yorum yapmayacak, haber verecek.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Sırf kendinizi şey yapıyorsunuz.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Ya, şimdi, "O olmaz." desinler, biz de kurtulalım yani.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Vekilim, o zaman her haberde, yayınlanan... Haberlerde de yayınlanıyor, "Drift attı." diye mesela haber yayınlıyor, ona da ceza vermemiz gerekiyor sizin mantığınızla; biz vermiyoruz. Haberlerde "Bu şoför çok güzel akrobasi hareket yapıyor. Bakın, bunu örnek alın, bunun gibi yapın." gibi övücü sözler söylerse ama diğeri haber yayınlıyor, "Driftten ceza aldı." diyor, bu kadar, övme yok.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Konvoyu yasaklıyor işte.
BAŞKAN CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Ya, konvoy ayrı yani sırf bir traktör çıktı diye suç olmayacak ki.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Konvoyu izah ettik, konvoy ayrı bir şey.
İÇİŞLERİ BAKAN YARDIMCISI MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Gerekçede zaten sizin şeyleriniz var Sayın Vekilim, gerekçede konmuş zaten; haber maksatlı, ihbar amaçlı yapılanların bu kapsama girmediği gerekçede var zaten Sayın Vekilimizin ifade ettiği gibi. Biraz gerekçeyle beraber bakmak lazım.
CUMHUR UZUN (Muğla) - Başkanım, yanlış anlaşılmayı engellemek için "överek yaymak" diyelim, "övmek ve yaymak" demek yerine "överek yaymak" diyelim.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Aynı anlama gelmiyor mu? "Övmek ve yaymak", "ve" olduğu için tereddüt yok, "veya" demiyor, "ve" diyor, birleştiriyor yani, "İkisi birlikte olacak." diyor.
records.englishTranslation:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Now, that is the intention, but will the practice be like that?
MAYOR CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Well, we have already specifically asked about the application.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - But, it is necessary to shape the implementation.
The concepts used, "praise" and "encouragement", were not expressed clearly enough anyway. Who praised, how he praised, etc.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - No, to spread and praise.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - "To publicly disseminate and praise encouraging images." Who praises
How it spreads is a bit confusing, though.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - What is meant by "praise" is not to praise verbally, but to write something under it or make a comment.
MAYOR CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - He will either write or make a video on social media.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Supporting with emojis.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - That's it. Now someone posted something like this, "I went this fast." ' he shared, and I commented under someone. Will he be punished too?
DEPUTY MINISTER OF INTERIOR MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - He does not spread it, he is the one who publishes it.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - You said so, "He wrote a comment." you said.
DEPUTY MINISTER OF INTERIOR MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - No, no; We say "together", Mr. Deputy. For the element of the crime to occur, both must occur at the same time.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Now then, let's look at this: Just now.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Let's make it concrete: You drifted, you will receive your punishment separately when you are caught committing Cyber ​​Crimes for drifting. So I took it and said: Our deputy drifts very well, he does acrobatics very well. Look, I'm publishing it." I both spread it and praised it. This is a crime. 25 thousand liras are just for me, but we will punish you for drifting.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Is this a crime: Tractors went on the highway in Yozgat and blocked traffic, we wrote a fine according to paragraph (n) of the 10th article, because they stopped and did so. Journalists also reported.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - Oh, you are pushing too hard.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - I am not forcing it, Mr. Deputy, these are the things that will happen.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - He doesn't praise, he makes news.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - That is not the intention, but it is alone.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - But the work done.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - No, that is not the intention, though.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Okay, let them say, "That is not the intention." Let them say.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - He doesn't praise him, he reports him.
DEPUTY MINISTER OF INTERIOR MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Dear Deputy, spreading is not a crime on its own, look, the elements of the crime are together.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Okay, Mr. Minister, let me explain it like this: Now, he came out and made praising news: "Look, how nice, he showed his democratic reaction, he did this, he did that." he reported.
DEPUTY MINISTER OF INTERIOR MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - This Yozgat tired us very much today.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Of course, it will be tiring, we will see these too.
Now, "Our aim is not Yozgat, it is such a punishment." Say, let's relax.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - He will not comment, he will report.
MAYOR CÜNEYT Yüksel - You are only making things out of yourself.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Well, now, "That won't happen." Let them say, so let's get rid of it.

İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - My deputy, in every news published at that time. It is also published in the news, "He drifted." For example, he publishes news, we need to punish him too, according to your logic; we do not give it. In the news, "This driver does very nice acrobatics. Look, take this as an example, do it like this." If he says praising words like, but the other one publishes news, "He was punished for drifting." He says, that's it, no praise.
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - It just bans the convoy.
MAYOR CÜNEYT YÜKSEL - Well, the convoy is separate, so there will be no crime just because a tractor appeared.
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - We explained the convoy, the convoy is a different thing.
DEPUTY MINISTER OF INTERIOR MÜNİR KARALOĞLU - Your things are already included in the justification, Mr. Deputy, they are already included in the justification; As our esteemed Deputy stated, there is a reason why those made for news purposes or notification purposes are not included in this scope. It is necessary to look at it with some justification.
CUMHUR UZUN (Muğla) - President, to avoid misunderstanding, let's say "spread by praising". Instead of saying "praise and spread", let's say "spread by praising".
İBRAHİM YURDUNUSEVEN (Afyonkarahisar) - Doesn't it mean the same thing? Since "praise and spread" is "and", there is no hesitation, it does not say "or", it says "and", it combines, that is, "The two will be together." he says.

records.title: Ceza ve Güvenlik Tedbirlerinin İnfazı Hakkında Kanun ile Bazı Kanunlarda Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3147) münasebetiyle

fields.Subject: Ceza ve Güvenlik Tedbirlerinin İnfazı Hakkında Kanun ile Bazı Kanunlarda Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi (2/3147) münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Sayın Başkanım, kıymetli Komisyon üyelerimiz, milletvekillerimiz, kıymetli bürokratlar; herkesi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
"Adalet" 6 harfin bir araya gelmesiyle oluşmuş alelade bir sözcük değildir, "adalet" sözlüklerde yer alan milyonlarca alelade sözcükten biri de değildir, "adalet" saraylarla ve saraylarda mana kazanmış bir sözcük de değildir; "adalet" anlamını vicdanlarda bulur,
vicdanı olmayanın adaleti de olmaz ya da kim ki adaletsizlik yapıyor, bilin ki onda vicdan da yoktur.
Bu anlamda, ülkeyi yönetenler şu soruya cevap vermeliler: "Biz bunca yıllık yönetim anlayışımızda hiç adaletsizlik yaptık mı?" diye kendilerine soracakları soruya cevap vermeliler. "Yapmadık." diyebilecekler mi? Bence diyemezler.
Kamu personel alımında, mesela mülakatlarda "Adaletsizlik yapmadık." diyebilirler mi? Mesela kamu çalışanlarına, emeklilere ücret ve aylık verirken, yokluğa, yoksulluğa sürüklerken "Adaletsizlik yapmadık, tamı tamına haklarını teslim ettik." diyebilirler mi? Çiftçinin mahsulüne fiyat verirken "Adaletsizlik yapmadık." diyebilirler mi? Kamu kaynaklarını yandaşa, yalakaya kullandırırken "Adaletsizlik yapmadık." diyebilirler mi? Örnek çok da -geçtiğimiz toplantıda da söyledim, bir kez daha söyleyeceğim- kamuya ait olan herkesin ödediği vergiden var ettiğimiz ve yaşattığımız TRT'nin seçim dönemleri ve sonrasında muhalefete karşı, ana muhalefete karşı tutumu adaletli diyen çıkabilir mi? Yargı mekanizması işlerken gözaltı, tutuklama, ceza tayini aşamalarında "Hiç adaletsizlik olmadı, olmaz." diyen çıkabilir mi? Çıkmaz.
Buradaki adaletsizliklerde hâkim hatası veya yorum hatası değil, bile isteye yapılan adaletsizlikler söz konusu. Bu adaletsizlikleri söyleyebilen çıkar mı? O da çıkmaz, o zaman vicdan da yok demektir. Vicdanı olan söyler, söyleyemeyen vicdansızdır. İnsan ahlaklı olmak durumundadır, devlet ise adaletli. Ahlak insanın idealidir, adalet devletin fakat bir başına ne devlet adil olabilir ne de insan ahlaklı davranabilir. Eğer gelişmiş bir kamu düzeni ve kurumsallaşmış bir hukuk sistemi yoksa, birey olarak insan da devlet de bu ideale yani ahlaka ve adalete ulaşamaz.
Milletimiz, bu adaletsizlikler karşısında, uğradığı vicdansızlıklar karşısında 31 Mart 2024'te, yirmi iki yıldır iktidarda tuttuğu AKP'yi ilk defa 2'nci parti yaptı, CHP'yi de 1'inci parti yaptı. Şimdi ise kamuoyuna yansıyan anketlere göre bu durum aynı şekilde devam ediyor yani CHP 1'inci parti, AKP 2'nci parti; iktidar muhalefet karşısında azınlığa düşmüş durumda.
Siyasette normal olan, bu duruma düşen siyasi partinin bu durumun sebeplerini bulup bu noktalardaki eksikliklerini tamamlamaya çalışmasıdır ama AKP ve iktidarı paylaştıkları öyle yapmıyor, muhalefeti yok etmeye çalışıyor. Ülke ekonomik krizde, en ufak siyasi bir hareketlenme olunca döviz de hareketleniyor; siyasi hareketlenmenin şiddeti de büyük olunca dövizdeki yansıması da büyük oluyor.
19 Martta 4 defa AKP'ye karşı seçim kazanmış, hatta hukuksuz şekilde iptal edilen seçimi bir kez daha kazanmış Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinin ve en az 15,5 milyon vatandaşın Cumhurbaşkanı adayı Sayın Ekrem İmamoğlu'na gözaltı yapılınca, dolar yarım saatte yüzde 10-15 değer kazanabiliyor yani Türk lirası otuz dakikada yüzde 10-15 değer kaybediyor. İzleyen günlerde yalvar yakar getirilen 35 milyar dolarlık yabancı sermaye de borsadan, tahvilden, para piyasalarından çıkıp gidiyor. Bu neden? Vicdansızlıktan ve hâliyle adaletsizlikten.
Sadece bundan mı? Hayır, yanı sıra beceriksizlikten. Ekonomik, siyasi, dış politik, iç politik, sosyal, kültürel, sanatsal beceriksizlikler AKP iktidarının karakteristiği olmuştur. Bu anlamda, elbette adalete, evrensel hukuka, demokrasiye, insan haklarına, özgürlüklere aykırı birçok yönü, uygulaması, tutumu olan AKP'nin ve Adalet Bakanlığının tüm bunlar yanında beceriksizliği de herkesin gözünün önünde tekrar tekrar tezahür etmektedir.
Başta Adalet Bakanı olmak üzere AKP yetkilileri onuncu yargı paketi ve infaz düzenlemesinden aylardır bahsetmektedirler. Ha bugün ha yarın diyerek günleri, haftaları, aylar geçirdiler, aylarca ağustos böceği misali saz çaldılar. Şimdi, önümüz bayram,
bir cumartesi günü aylardır anlatılan onuncu yargı paketini görüşüyoruz. Bu teklif Genel Kurula en erken salı günü indirilebilir. 30 madde nasıl kaliteli bir şekilde görüşülüp yasalaştırılacak? Aylardır konuşulup günlere, saatlere, hatta dakikalara sığdırılacak bir yasama faaliyeti olur mu? Adalet Bakanlığının aylardır yapamadığını bizim iki günde yapmamız bekleniyor. Zorlamayla, bayram tatili şantajıyla yasama yapılmaz. Bu şekilde yapılacak yasama faaliyeti nitelikli olabilir mi?
Ayrıca, bizzat Adalet Bakanı tarafından defalarca telaffuz edilen ve beklenti yaratılan "Covid yasası" diye tabir edilen düzenleme de pakette yok. O zaman bu paketi niye son güne kadar beklettiniz? Yine içine ne saklandı? Bayramı öne sürerek muhalefeti sıkıştırıp gözden kaçırılacak ne var bu düzenlemenin içinde? Bakacağız, maddelere geçince göreceğiz.
Biz de toplumumuz da artık alıştı bu ikircikli tutuma, bu yüzden ülkedeki adalete inanç ve güven yerlerde sürünüyor. Ülke içinde yapılan anketlerde adalete güvenen neredeyse yok gibi, uluslararası istatistiklerde ise en gerilerde yer alıyoruz. Bu nedenle de zamanında yüzde 49,5 düzeyindeki oy oranlarına ulaşan AKP, şimdi yüzde 30'ların altında, yüzde 20'lik oy oranlarına düşmüş durumda. AK PARTİ'yi yönetenler suçu başkasında değil, kendilerinde aramalı, önce adaleti sağlamalı, sonra vicdanlarda açtığı yaraları tedavi etmeli, sonra seçim kazanmayı hedeflemelidir. Bu ülkede konuşmamın başından beri söylediğim adaletsizlikler, vicdansızlıklar sürerken tekrar seçim kazanmayı ve iktidarda kalmayı başaramayacağınızı anlamalısınız. Abbas'ın yolculuğunun bağlamakla önlenemeyeceğini bilmek ve anlamak hem ülkeyi hem de sizler rahatlatacak.
Toplumun hukuksal düzenlemelerden genel beklentisi kanun önünde eşitliğin sağlanması, adalet beklentisinin tatmin edilmesi, hakkı zelil olduğu iddiasındaki bireyin hakkına hukuk yoluyla kavuşabileceğine inanması, günü geldiğinde kendisinden güçlü olana, mesela devlete karşı kendisinin hukuki güvencede olduğunu hissetmesidir. Hukuk, devleti vatandaşa karşı korumaz, vatandaşı devletten, devlet adına yetki kullananların haksızlıklarından korur.
Bu kadar paket, 10 tane paket getirdiniz, bu noktada vatandaş hukuki emniyettedir denilebilir mi? Elbette denilemez, aksine toplum, vatandaş, siyaset yargı eliyle sindirilmeye çalışılıyor ama bunu yapanlar bilsinler ki karşılarında sinecek bir topluluk yok, hele hele fakruzaruret içindeki bir halkla yedi düvele kafa tutmuş bir önderin mirası olan, savaş meydanlarında kurulmuş, kökü Kuvayımilliyeye, Anadolu ve Rumeli Müdâfaa-i Hukuk Cemiyetlerine dayanan CHP'yi sindirebilecek bir gücü daha tarih yazmadı, bu sefer de yazmayacak. Seçimde yenilebiliriz ama korkmayız, sinmeyiz.
Az önce bahsettim, vatandaş kendisini hukuki anlamda güvende hissetmiyor dedim. İktidarın hoşuna gitmeyen bir karar veren ya da iktidarın beklediği yönde karar vermeyeceği anlaşılan hâkimin ya mahkemesi ya da yeri değiştiriliyor. Ahmak davasının hâkimi Samsun'a, Ayşe Barım davasında tahliye veren sulh ceza hâkimi icra mahkemesi hâkimi yapılıyor. O zaman o hâkimden adalet beklenebilir mi? Sonra Adalet Bakanı çıkıyor, zaten sanık avukatlarının önceden reddihâkim talebi olduğunu söyleyebiliyor; buna "arsızca" denir. Her reddihâkim talebi yapılan hâkimin yeri mi değiştiriliyor?
Tutuklu bulunan Esenyurt Belediye Başkanımızla Sayın Genel Başkanımızın görüşme talebinin karşılanmadığı kamuoyuna yansıyınca Adalet Bakanı "İzin isteyeceksiniz, adam gibi isteyeceksiniz." diyebiliyor; adam gibi izin istemek hangi kanunda yazıyor?
Bir de Adalet Bakanı çıkıp -eskiden daha sık yapıyordu, şimdi daha az yapıyor- günde üç öğün "Türkiye bir hukuk devletidir, yargılama sonucunu bekleyelim." diyor. Bir şey sizin söylediğiniz gibiyse zaten bakınca görülür, eğer görülmüyorsa o şey sizin anlattığınız şey değildir yani olmayan hukuk devleti Adalet Bakanı öyle dedi diye var olmuyor.
Mesela yolda yürüyeni tutuklamakla ya da duran vatandaşını gözaltına almakla hukuk devleti var olmuş mu oluyor? Mesela gizli soruşturmada heybedeki turpları sayanlar oluyorsa hukuk devleti mi olmuş oluyoruz? Bazı sözler size
ters gelebilir, yaşam tarzınıza, sosyal çevrenize ve sizin anlayışınıza ters gelebilir ama suç değildir. İktidar, anlayışına ters gelen her şeyi soruşturma konusu yaptırıyor. Kanunsuz suç ve cezanın olmayacağı ilkesinin yok sayıldığı bir yerde hukuk devletinden bahsedilebilir mi?
Halk TV davası yani bilirkişinin telefon görüşmesinin yayınlanması davası. Savcı, Türk Ceza Kanunu'nun 27'nci maddesinde kaldırılan suçtan soruşturma yürüttü, dava açtı; Suat Toktaş otuz dört gün tutuklu kaldı, ilk celsede tüm sanıklar beraat etti. Savcı, suçun kanundan kaldırıldığını, çıkarıldığını bilmiyor mu? Halk TV davasında tutuklama kararı veren hâkim ile davayı açan savcıya ne yapıldı? Biz bir şey duymadık. Kanun önünde eşitlik, kanunların herkese eşit uygulanacağı, kanunsuz suç ve ceza olmayacağı ilkesi ne oldu? Buharlaştı.
Şimdi, geçen gün de gösterdim, Yargı Reformu Stratejisi Belgesi var. Burada, Yargı Reformu Stratejisi Belgesi'nde hak ve özgürlükler konusunda yapılanlara yer verilmiş. Bunların başında tutuklamaların istisna olduğu, şarta bağlı olduğu, şartlarının, delillerinin, sebeplerinin somut olarak gösterilmesi gerektiği, kararlarda gösterilmesi gerektiği düzenlemelerle zorunlu kılındı diye belgede yer almış. Bireysel hak ihlallerine karşı yapılan müracaatlarda, hak ihlali kararından sonra ihlal edilen bireysel hakkına kavuşması noktasında yapılan düzenlemeler ifade edilmiş ama hak ihlali kararı verilenler bireysel hakkına kavuşamıyor. Anayasa Mahkemesi, Avrupa İnsan Hakları Mahkemesi kararlarının meslekte yükselme ve değerlendirmede ele alınması, dikkate alınması konusunda düzenlemeler yapıldığı ifade edilmiş ama günümüzde herkesin muzdarip olduğu sorun yani tedbir hükümlerinin bir cezalandırma aracına dönüşmüş olması, başta tutuklama olmak üzere, Yargı Reformu Stratejisi Belgesi'nde bu konuda ne bir amaç ne de bir hedef öngörülmemiş. Yani bizim bugüne kadar yaptıklarımız bu konularda yeterli diyerek herhangi bir adım atma düşüncesi olmadığını Strateji Belgesi'nde ifade etmişler, daha doğrusu yer vermeyerek göstermişler. Bunlarla ilgili bir farkındalık olmadığı sürece bu sorunların çözülmesi maalesef ki mümkün değil. Bu sorunun yani başta tutuklama olmak üzere tedbir hükümlerinin yarattığı cezalandırma görüntüsünün ortadan kaldırılabilmesi için öncelikle bu konuda bir sorun olduğunu Adalet Bakanlığının fark etmesi ve kabul etmesi lazım.
Bu noktada yapılan düzenlemeler, Yargı Reformu Stratejisi Belgesi'nde anlatılanlar âdeta aklımızla alay eder gibi. Türkiye'de hukuk devleti, iktidara ve Cumhurbaşkanına dokununcaya kadar var. Seçimler, AK PARTİ kazanırsa makbul. Millî irade, AK PARTİ'ye yönelirse millî egemenliğin bir unsuru. Siyaset, Cumhurbaşkanının koltuğunu sallayıncaya kadar serbest. Ne kadar trajikomik bir durum, İmamoğlu'nun otuz beş yıllık diplomasına "sahte" diyenler, iptal edenler, devlete sızan FETÖ'cülerden haberdar değilmiş! Geçmişte devlet Erdoğan'ı engellemeye çalıştı, siyaseten yasak getirdi, engelleyemedi, şimdi Erdoğan devlet oldu, İmamoğlu'nu engellemeye çalışıyor. "Tarih tekerrürden ibarettir." diye söylenir ama doğrusu "Tarih birbirine benzer olaylardan ibarettir." sözüdür.
Bu itibarla, benzer olaylardan ders çıkarmak lazım, olmayacak işlerle uğraşıp toplumu, ülkeyi, insanımızı daha fazla zorlamamak, yormamak gerekir, demokrasiye, millet iradesine inanmak gerekir; ne yapılırsa yapılsın bu gidişat değişmeyecektir.
Teşekkür ediyorum Sayın Başkan.
records.englishTranslation:
İSMAİL ATAKAN ÜNVER (Karaman) - Dear President, our esteemed Commission members, deputies, esteemed bureaucrats; I greet everyone with respect.
"Justice" is not an ordinary word formed by combining 6 letters, "justice" is not one of the millions of ordinary words in dictionaries, "justice" is not a word that has gained meaning in palaces and palaces; "Justice" finds its meaning in conscience,
There is no justice for someone who has no conscience, or whoever commits injustice, know that he has no conscience either.
In this sense, those who govern the country should answer the following question: "Have we ever done injustice in our management approach over all these years?" They should answer the question they ask themselves. "We didn't." Will they be able to say? I don't think they can say that.
"We did not commit injustice" in public personnel recruitment, for example in interviews. Can they say? For example, while giving wages and salaries to public employees and retirees, while dragging them into poverty and want, "We did not commit injustice, we gave them their full rights." Can they say? "We did not commit injustice" when pricing the farmer's produce. Can they say? "We did not commit injustice" while allowing public resources to be used by cronies and sycophants. Can they say? This is a very example - I said it in the last meeting and I will say it again - can anyone say that TRT, which we created and sustained from the taxes paid by everyone who belongs to the public, has a fair attitude towards the opposition and the main opposition during and after the election periods? While the judicial mechanism is functioning, "There has never been any injustice, there will be no injustice" in the stages of detention, arrest and sentencing. Can anyone say? Impasse.
The injustices here are not judge's mistakes or interpretation errors, but intentional injustices. Can anyone speak out about these injustices? If that doesn't happen, then there is no conscience. Those who have a conscience say it, those who cannot say it are unscrupulous. People have to be moral, and the state has to be fair. Morality is the ideal of man, justice is the ideal of the state, but neither the state alone nor the human being can act morally. If there is no developed public order and an institutionalized legal system, neither the individual nor the state can achieve this ideal, that is, morality and justice.
In the face of these injustices and the unconscionability it suffered, on March 31, 2024, our nation made the AKP, which it had been in power for twenty-two years, the 2nd party for the first time, and the CHP the 1st party. Now, according to the surveys reflected to the public, this situation continues in the same way, that is, CHP is the 1st party, AKP is the 2nd party; The government is in a minority against the opposition.
What is normal in politics is that the political party that is in this situation tries to find the reasons for this situation and complete its deficiencies in these points, but the AKP and those with whom they share the power do not do that, they try to destroy the opposition. The country is in economic crisis, and whenever there is the slightest political movement, the foreign exchange also moves; When the intensity of political mobilization is greater, its reflection in foreign currency is also greater.

When Mr. Ekrem İmamoğlu, the Presidential candidate of the Republican People's Party and at least 15.5 million citizens, who won the election against the AKP four times on March 19, and even won the illegally canceled election once again, was detained, the dollar can gain 10-15 percent in value in half an hour, meaning the Turkish lira loses 10-15 percent in thirty minutes. In the following days, 35 billion dollars of foreign capital, which was brought begging, leaves the stock market, bond and money markets. Why is this? Because of lack of conscience and therefore injustice.
Just this? No, as well as incompetence. Economic, political, foreign political, domestic political, social, cultural and artistic incompetence have been characteristic of the AKP government. In this sense, of course, the incompetence of the AKP and the Ministry of Justice, which has many aspects, practices and attitudes that are contrary to justice, universal law, democracy, human rights and freedoms, is manifested again and again in front of everyone's eyes.
AKP officials, especially the Minister of Justice, have been talking about the tenth judicial package and execution regulation for months. They spent days, weeks, months saying "today or tomorrow", and for months they played the saz like a cicada. Now, the holiday is ahead of us,
We are discussing the tenth judicial package, which has been talked about for months, on a Saturday. This proposal can be downloaded to the General Assembly on Tuesday at the earliest. How will the 30 articles be discussed and enacted in a quality manner? Can there be a legislative activity that has been talked about for months and can be compressed into days, hours or even minutes? We are expected to do in two days what the Ministry of Justice has not been able to do for months. Legislation cannot be made by force or holiday holiday blackmail. Can the legislative activity carried out in this way be qualified?
In addition, the so-called "Covid law", which has been repeatedly stated and expected by the Minister of Justice himself, is not included in the package. Then why did you keep this package waiting until the last day? What was hidden inside again? What is there in this regulation that can be overlooked by pressuring the opposition by citing the holiday? We'll see, we'll see when we get to the items.
Both we and our society have become accustomed to this ambivalent attitude, which is why faith and trust in justice in the country is slipping away. According to surveys conducted within the country, almost no one has confidence in justice, and we are at the bottom in international statistics. For this reason, the AKP, which once reached 49.5 percent of the votes, has now fallen to 20 percent, below 30 percent. Those who govern the AK PARTY should seek the blame not on anyone else but on themselves, first ensure justice, then heal the wounds they inflicted on conscience, and then aim to win elections. You must understand that you will not be able to win elections again and stay in power while the injustices and unconscionability that I have been talking about since the beginning of my speech continue in this country. Knowing and understanding that Abbas' journey cannot be prevented by tying him down will relieve both the country and you.

The general expectation of the society from legal regulations is to ensure equality before the law, to satisfy the expectation of justice, to believe that the individual who claims that his rights are degraded can regain his rights through law, and to feel that he is legally safe against those who are stronger than him, for example, the state. Law does not protect the state against the citizen, it protects the citizen from the state and from the injustice of those who exercise authority on behalf of the state.
You brought so many packages, 10 packages, can it be said that the citizen is in legal security at this point? Of course, it cannot be said, on the contrary, society, citizens and politics are being tried to be intimidated by the judiciary, but those who do this should know that there is no community to intimidate them, especially history has not recorded a power that can intimidate the CHP, which is the legacy of a leader who defied all the powers with a people in poverty, was founded in the battlefields, and whose roots are based on Kuvayımilliye, Anatolia and Rumelia Defense of Law Societies, and this time it will not write. We may be defeated in the election, but we will not be afraid or intimidated.
I just mentioned that citizens do not feel legally safe. A judge who makes a decision that the government does not like or who is understood not to make a decision in the direction that the government expects is either changed in court or in the venue. The judge of the Ahmak case is being appointed to Samsun, and the criminal judge of peace who granted the release in the Ayşe Barım case is being made an enforcement court judge. Then, can justice be expected from that judge? Then the Minister of Justice appears and can say that the defendant's lawyers have already requested a recusal; this is called "cheeky". Is the place of the judge replaced for every request for recusal?
When it was revealed to the public that our President's request to meet with the detained Esenyurt Mayor and our President was not met, the Minister of Justice said, "You will ask for permission, you will ask for it properly." can say; Which law says asking for permission properly?
And then the Minister of Justice came out and said - he used to do it more often, now he does it less often - three meals a day, "Türkiye is a state of law, let's wait for the outcome of the trial." he says. If something is as you say, it can be seen when you look at it. If it is not seen, it is not what you describe. In other words, the non-existent state of law does not exist just because the Minister of Justice said so.
For example, does the state of law exist by arresting a person walking on the road or detaining a citizen standing on the road? For example, if there are people counting the radishes in the saddlebags during the secret investigation, are we in a state of law? Some words to you
It may seem wrong, it may go against your lifestyle, your social environment and your understanding, but it is not a crime. The government makes everything that contradicts its understanding subject to investigation. Can we talk about the rule of law in a place where the principle that there will be no crime and punishment without law is ignored?
Halk TV case, that is, the case of broadcasting the expert's phone call. The prosecutor conducted an investigation and filed a lawsuit against the crime abolished in Article 27 of the Turkish Penal Code; Suat Toktaş was detained for thirty-four days, and all defendants were acquitted in the first hearing. Doesn't the prosecutor know that the crime has been removed from the law? What was done to the judge who issued the arrest warrant and the prosecutor who opened the case in the Halk TV case? We didn't hear anything.

What happened to the principle of equality before the law, that laws apply equally to everyone, that there will be no crime or punishment without law? It evaporated.
Now, as I showed you the other day, there is a Judicial Reform Strategy Document. Here, the actions taken regarding rights and freedoms in the Judicial Reform Strategy Document are included. First of all, it is stated in the document that arrests are exceptions, they are conditional, their conditions, evidence and reasons must be shown concretely, and it is made mandatory by the regulations that they must be shown in the decisions. In the applications made against individual rights violations, the arrangements made to regain the violated individual rights after the decision of rights violation were expressed, but those whose rights were violated cannot regain their individual rights. It has been stated that regulations have been made for the decisions of the Constitutional Court and the European Court of Human Rights to be considered and taken into account in career promotion and evaluation, but the problem that everyone suffers from today, that is, the injunction provisions have turned into a tool of punishment, especially arrest, is neither a purpose nor a target in this regard, in the Judicial Reform Strategy Document. In other words, they stated in the Strategy Document that they had no intention of taking any steps, saying that what we have done so far is sufficient on these issues, or rather they showed it by not including it. Unfortunately, it is not possible to solve these problems unless there is awareness about them. In order to eliminate this problem, that is, the appearance of punishment created by precautionary measures, especially arrest, the Ministry of Justice must first realize and accept that there is a problem in this regard.
At this point, the regulations made and what is described in the Judicial Reform Strategy Document seem to mock our minds. In Türkiye, the rule of law exists until it touches the government and the President. Elections are acceptable if AK PARTY wins. If the national will turns towards the AK PARTY, it is an element of national sovereignty. Politics is free until the President shakes his seat. What a tragicomic situation, those who called İmamoğlu's thirty-five-year-old diploma "fake" and canceled it were not aware of the FETO members who infiltrated the state! In the past, the state tried to prevent Erdoğan, it banned him politically, but could not prevent him, now Erdoğan has become a state and is trying to prevent İmamoğlu. "History repeats itself." It is said, but the truth is, "History consists of similar events." is the word.
In this respect, it is necessary to learn lessons from similar events, we should not strain or tire the society, the country, and our people by dealing with impossible things, we should believe in democracy and the will of the nation; No matter what is done, this situation will not change.
Thank you, Mr. President.
